phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si arriva al lato di San Polo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see ar-REE-vah al LAH-toh dee san POH-loh, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: Go down the stairs and turn right.
responses.phonetic: SHEHN-dah LEH SKAH-leh EH JEE-ree AH DEH-strah
responses.local: Scenda le scale e giri a destra.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è la fermata del vaporetto Rialto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH lah fer-MAH-tah del vah-po-RET-toh ry-AL-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: Along the Grand Canal, both sides.
responses.phonetic: LOON-goh EEL KAH-nahl GRAHN-deh ehnt-RAHM-beh LEH SPOHN-deh
responses.local: Lungo il Canal Grande, entrambe le sponde.

phrases.intent_en: Ask when the Rialto Bridge was built
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quando è stato costruito il Ponte di Rialto?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-doh eh STAH-toh kos-TWEE-toh eel PON-teh dee RYAH-ltoh?
phrases.cultural_note: The current stone Rialto Bridge was completed in 1591, replacing a series of timber bridges that had stood since the 13th century.

responses.english: In 1591, designed by Antonio da Ponte.
responses.phonetic: nel meel-CHEEN-kweh-CHEN-toh-noh-VAN-tah-OO-noh, soo proh-JET-toh dee an-TOH-nyoh dah PON-teh.
responses.local: Nel 1591, su progetto di Antonio da Ponte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the market stalls are on the bridge
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si trovano i negozi sul Ponte di Rialto?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see troh-VAH-noh ee neh-GOH-tsee sool PON-teh dee RYAH-ltoh?

responses.english: On both sides of the bridge, under the arches.
responses.phonetic: soo en-TRAM-bee ee LAH-tee del PON-teh, SOT-toh leh ar-KAH-teh.
responses.local: Su entrambi i lati del ponte, sotto le arcate.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to get the best view of the bridge from the water
phrases.text_local: Scusi, da dove si fotografa meglio il Ponte di Rialto?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, dah DOH-veh see foh-toh-GRAH-fah MEL-lyoh eel PON-teh dee RYAH-ltoh?

responses.english: From the Grand Canal, on vaporetto line one.
responses.phonetic: dal kah-NAH-leh GRAN-deh, een vah-poh-RET-toh LEE-neh-ah OO-noh.
responses.local: Dal Canal Grande, in vaporetto linea uno.
